name: 1997-cabletron--discovering-the-beacon-u-2d44d5
title: Cabletron: Discovering the Beacon Under the Basket
description: Aberdeen Group Company Profile (Spring 1997) of Cabletron Systems, Inc., analyzing the company's technical leadership, perception challenges, PPSN market positioning, World/One global expansion strategy, SecureFast VLAN architecture, Spectrum network management, SmartSwitch product family, and CyberSWITCH remote access line.
